execution.title: 执行工作区
execution.help_tooltip: 项目所有的隔离问题检查和执行工作区行为的默认值。
execution.enable_hint: 允许问题在项目的主要检查和隔离执行工作区之间选择。
execution.default_isolated_label: 新问题默认使用隔离检查
execution.default_isolated_hint: 如果禁用，新问题将保留在项目的主要检查上，除非有人选择退出。
execution.provision_teardown_hint: 配置在代理执行之前在派生的 worktree 内运行。清理存储在此处以供将来的清理流使用。

new_project.local_folder_tooltip: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.

board_claim.claimed_desc: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
board_claim.sign_in_required_desc: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
board_claim.claim_desc: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

cli_auth.approved_desc: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cli_auth.restart_desc: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cli_auth.sign_in_required_desc: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cli_auth.approve_desc: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cli_auth.admin_required: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.
cli_auth.update_failed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge

new_agent.title: New Agent

new_agent.no_skills: No optional company skills installed yet.

workspace.not_found: Workspace not found for this project.
workspace.configure_workspace_desc: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow.
workspace.configure_workspace_detail: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
workspace.workspace_settings_desc: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
workspace.runtime_config_source_execution: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
workspace.runtime_config_source_project: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
workspace.runtime_config_source_none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
workspace.workspace_routines_desc: Routines that use workspace-specific variables can be run against this execution workspace.
workspace.provision_command_hint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
workspace.teardown_command_hint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
workspace.advanced_runtime_override_desc: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
workspace.workspace_commands_hint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

detail.intro: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
detail.primary_badge: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
detail.service_stopped: Workspace service stopped. Issue execution is not paused.
detail.service_restarted: Workspace service restarted. Issue execution is not paused.
detail.error_remote_requires_ref: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
detail.error_requires_path_or_repo: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
detail.error_path_must_be_absolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.

local_path.label: Local git checkout
local_path.description: A local path Paperclip can use directly.

non_git_path.label: Local non-git path
non_git_path.description: A local folder without git semantics.

git_repo.label: Remote git repo
git_repo.description: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.

remote_managed.label: Remote-managed workspace
remote_managed.description: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.

hint.setup_command: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
hint.cleanup_command: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
hint.commands_json: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

detail.advanced_json_desc: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
detail.commands_desc: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
detail.no_services_started: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
detail.no_command_config: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
detail.no_jobs: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
detail.disabled_hint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.

workspace.error_runtime_must_be_object: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.
workspace.error_repo_url_invalid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.

plugins.install_desc: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
plugins.alpha_desc: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
plugins.no_installed_desc: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
plugins.no_examples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
plugins.uninstall_desc: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
plugins.no_settings: This plugin does not require any settings.
plugins.runtime_dashboard_desc: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
plugins.health_checks_pending: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.
plugins.select_company: Select a company to view this page.
plugins.route_conflict: Multiple plugins declare the route {{route}}. Use the plugin-id route until the conflict is resolved.
plugins.runtime_unavailable: Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
plugins.env_drivers_heading: Configure this plugin from Company Environments.
plugins.env_drivers_body: {{drivers}} registers environment runtime settings there so credentials stay company-scoped instead of instance-global.

access_roles.viewer_desc: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
access_roles.operator_desc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
access_roles.admin_desc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
access_roles.admin_grants: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
access_roles.owner_desc: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
access_roles.owner_grants: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.

workspace_close.archive_suffix: and clean up any owned workspace artifacts. Paperclip keeps the workspace record and issue history, but removes it from active workspace views.
workspace_close.checking_safe_to_close: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
workspace_close.failed_to_inspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
workspace_close.shared_workspace_note: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
workspace_close.own_checkout_path_note: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
workspace_close.primary_workspace_note: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
workspace_close.disposable_note: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
workspace_close.previously_failed_note: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.
